prose:
The frontier-orbital gap for furan was computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) level of theory with density fitting in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1, using the geometry provided in `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. The SCF converged in 9 cycles.

The HOMO energy is -6.3597638 eV, and the LUMO energy is -0.1024036 eV. The resulting Koopmans-style orbital gap is 6.2573602 eV.
